metadata.raw: {"ID":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/ssi/2025/404","TITLE":"The Scottish Secure Tenancies (Proceedings for Possession) (Form of Notice) Amendment Regulations 2025","LINK (SELF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/ssi/2025/404","LINK":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/404/made","LINK (XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/404/made/data.xml","LINK (RDF/XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/404/made/data.rdf","LINK (AKN)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/404/made/data.akn","LINK (HTML snippet)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/404/made/data.xht","LINK (Website (XHTML) Default View)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/404/made/data.htm","LINK (PDF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/404/made/data.pdf","LINK (Table of Contents)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/404/contents/made","AUTHOR":"","UPDATED":"2025-12-18T12:58:13Z","PUBLISHED":"2025-12-18T12:53:04.339649Z","DocumentMainType":"ScottishStatutoryInstrument","YEAR":"2025","NUMBER":"404","ISBN":"'9780111064733'","AlternativeNumber":"","CreationDate":"2025-12-16","SUBJECT":"LANDLORD AND TENANT","Supersedes":"","CATEGORY":"LANDLORD AND TENANT","SUMMARY":"These Regulations amend the Scottish Secure Tenancies (Proceedings for Possession) (Form of Notice) Regulations 2012 (“the 2012 Regulations”). The 2012 Regulations prescribe the form of notice to be used by a landlord when notifying its tenant and any qualifying occupier under a Scottish secure tenancy, within the meaning of Part 2 of the Housing (Scotland) Act 2001 (“the 2001 Act”), that the landlord may raise proceedings for recovery of possession of the house.","":""}

content: equent legislation and applied by our editorial team. Changes we have not yet applied to the text, can be found in the ‘Changes to Legislation’ area. Original (As Enacted or Made): The original version of the legislation as it stood when it was enacted or made. No changes have been applied to the text. Opening Options Different options to open legislation in order to view more content on screen at once Policy Note Policy Note sets out a brief statement of the purpose of a Scottish Statutory Instrument and provides information about its policy objective and policy implications. They aim to make the Scottish Statutory Instrument accessible to readers who are not legally qualified and accompany any Scottish Statutory Instrument or Draft Scottish Statutory Instrument laid before the Scottish Parliament from July 2012 onwards. Prior to this date these type of notes existed as ‘Executive Notes’ and accompanied Scottish Statutory Instruments from July 2005 until July 2012.
